scans.summary: Manav Tiwari is a highly motivated B.Sc. Computer Science (Hons.) undergraduate with foundational knowledge in Full-Stack Development, Data Science, and Generative AI. He has practical experience in building frontend and backend projects, proficiency in project management, Tally ERP, and leadership experience in college event orchestration. He is eager to apply his problem-solving and communication skills to technology-driven solutions.
missingKeywords: Web Frameworks (e.g., React, Angular, Node.js, Django, Flask)
